projects.title: Three Fold Groove
projects.description: The Three Fold Groove is a warm, traditional contemporary home designed for a young couple and their baby daughter. Soft arches and gentle curves were intentionally introduced to eliminate sharp edges, creating a safer and more fluid environment for their newborn. Paired with rattan veneer and solid wood, the space feels nurturing, elegant, and timeless

projects.title: Oasis
projects.description: Oasis is a warm contemporary retreat in Bangalore, designed for a Singapore-based family seeking a calm and welcoming space to return to and to share as a serene Airbnb when they’re away. With earthy textures, soft neutrals, and warm wood tones, the home blends modern minimalism with effortless comfort and quiet elegance.

projects.title: Srujana
projects.description: Srujana is a traditional home designed for a couple and their son, rooted in their love for art, culture, and heritage. The space celebrates vibrant colours, rich textures, and timeless brass elements, creating an atmosphere that feels warm, expressive, and deeply personal. Thoughtfully layered details bring together tradition and artistry in a refined, contemporary way.

projects.title: Kaira
projects.description: Kaira is a modern Indian contemporary home designed for a middle-aged couple and their son. Rooted in warmth and familiarity, the space blends clean lines with natural wood tones, soft neutrals, and subtle Indian sensibilities. Balanced, practical, and refined, Kaira is a home that feels modern yet deeply connected to everyday Indian living.

projects.title: AIKYA
projects.description: Aikya is a Japandi-inspired home designed for a couple, blending Japanese minimalism with Indian warmth. Clean lines, natural wood, soft textures, and earthy tones come together to create a space that feels calm, balanced, and deeply personal where two worlds meet in harmony.
